prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（含物理类）最低位次依次为约3339名→2705名→3129名→3419名→2886名，整体呈波动走势，2025年较2024年回升约533名，近3年累计后移约222名；2025年基准约2886名；本省理科（含物理类）计划2021年65人、2022年61人、2023年61人、2024年58人、2025年59人；2026年计划58人，较2025年减少1人，小幅缩招，理论上使竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第16名，稳居全国Top20，层次极高，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为明显负面，涉及师德师风、学术不端等事件（51条事件中负面46条），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第35（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2022–2023年曾出现投档线异常信号，2023年关注度最高；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共19个学科，包括口腔医学A+、中国语言文学A+、护理学A+、临床医学A、数学A、化学A、药学A、软件工程A、轻工技术与工程A等，医学、文史、理工实力均衡，王牌专业吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、电气类等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业长期高热；2026年内蒙古普通高考考生总数约154000人，较2025年（历史类+物理类约116360人）大幅增加约32%，竞争显著加剧；四川大学位于成都市（西南地区中心城市），对内蒙古考生具有较强跨省吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生计划占比较小（约58–59人），地域偏好因素对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2886名、2026年计划小幅缩招（-1人，理论上缓解竞争）、2026年内蒙古考生总数大幅增加约32%（竞争显著加剧）、声誉负面可能抑制部分报考意愿、学校层次极高且优势学科众多（维持强吸引力）等多重因素，竞争加剧效应占主导；预测2026年理科最低位次约2907名，区间2616–3198名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 3339 → 2705 → 3129 → 3419 → 2886, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2025, it rebounded by about 533 places compared to 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 222 places over the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2886. The provincial science (including physics category) enrollment plan was 65 in 2021, 61 in 2022, 61 in 2023, 58 in 2024, and 59 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 58, a decrease of 1 from 2025, a slight reduction in enrollment, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it is approximately 16th, firmly in the national Top 20, with a very high level, maintaining strong appeal to high-scoring students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving incidents of teacher ethics and academic misconduct (46 negative out of 51 incidents), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure. From 2022 to 2023, there were abnormal signals in admission scores, with the highest attention in 2023. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, Light Industry Technology and Engineering A, etc., with balanced strength in medicine, humanities, and science and engineering, and extremely strong appeal of its flagship majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. Medical majors like Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have long been highly popular. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 116,360 for history and physics categories combined), sharply intensifying competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (a central city in the Southwest region), which has strong cross-provincial appeal to Inner Mongolian candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia accounts for a small proportion (about 58–59 people), so regional preference factors have limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2886, a slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-1 person, theoretically easing competition), a significant increase of about 32% in the total number of Inner Mongolian candidates in 2026 (sharply intensifying competition), negative reputation possibly suppressing some application willingness, and the university's very high level and numerous advantageous disciplines (maintaining strong appeal), the competition intensification effect dominates. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be approximately 2907, with a range of 2616–3198.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Program)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
- Computer Science (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
- Electronic Information
- Electrical Engineering
- Engineering Pilot Class (Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Aerospace Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Advanced Chemical Engineering and High-End Equipment)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Green City and Smart Construction)
- Engineering Pilot Class (Advanced Low-Carbon Materials, Food Health and Intelligent Design)
- Public Health and Preventive Medicine (Including Dual Bachelor's Degree)
- Finance
- Management Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (2616–3198), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical Medicine Eight-Year/Stomatology/Computer Science) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2600), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., after 3100), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a backup, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were approximately 360 → 968 → 924 → 511 → 331, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing. In 2025, it rebounded to the highest level in recent years (331), an increase of about 180 places compared to 2024. The provincial liberal arts (including history category) enrollment plan was 6 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 13 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 13, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 16th, firmly in the national Top 20, with a very high level and strong appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics and academic misconduct, which may somewhat suppress some students' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 35th (relatively hot), with above-average short video exposure. Related advantageous disciplines in liberal arts include Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A, Law A-, Marxist Theory A, and Archaeology A-, with strong strength in literature, history, philosophy, and law, attracting liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Chinese and Journalism Communication) and Economics have stable to slightly hot social popularity. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors including the 2025 baseline ranking of 331, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan (no expansion or reduction), the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of Inner Mongolia candidates in 2026 (intensified competition), the very high university level with strong liberal arts disciplines (maintaining strong appeal), and the negative reputation possibly slightly suppressing applications, the competition intensification effect slightly dominates. The predicted 2026 minimum ranking for liberal arts is approximately 346, with a range of 296–396.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 300), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors.
